episode.title: MTG Fast Finance Ep 512: Chaos Drop Shenanigans
episode.description:
James and Cliff go over the weekly top movers, meta shifts, cards to watch and the results of the recent Chaos Drop on the Secret Lair site that featured multiple price points for the same products.

Intro/Outro Music by Skylarka
